input_json.question: What is the minimum side setback for a single dwelling in an R40 zone under the WA Residential Design Codes?

refusal.message: No approved source version is currently available to support this question. The answer cannot be provided without an official citation.
refusal.detail: cite-or-refuse contract: unanswerable without approved source_version with licence_status=allowed and review_status=approved.

metadata_json.name: Cite or refuse — /search/ask refuses when no approved source is available
metadata_json.notes: Validates the cite-or-refuse contract for /search/ask: when no approved source version is in scope (empty available_approved_source_version_ids), the endpoint must refuse with a structured refusal body rather than hallucinating an answer. The response must also record a job_trace (model tracing required even for refusals — substrate must be active). Ref: MASTER_REBUILD_PLAN.md §7 'No LLM call without substrate' and §8.1 cite-or-refuse composer. source_version_id field here is for the eval harness linkage; the input's available_approved_source_version_ids is intentionally empty to trigger the refusal path. Replace source_version_id placeholder at Stage 3.
